backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the IPGT backend, handling IP record registration and querying, user profile management, and access control via mixed-in authorization and blob storage modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features — changing the world map continent color to near-black and reducing hero background pixelation — to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and config file's purpose and styling approach within the IPGT Black/Gold/White theme.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, border, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with the IPGT page title, favicon pointing to the generated logo asset, and a root div for mounting the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper pages under a shared Layout root route, with session storage cleanup for admin tokens.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedWorldMap: Canvas-based animated world map component that draws continent outlines in near-black, a subtle gold grid, and animated pulsing dots at major city coordinates using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with deep black background, IPGT branding and shield icon, navigation links, platform feature list, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution line with gold accents.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu, using TanStack Router for navigation and active-link highlighting.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Card component that displays a summary of an IP record (title, category badge, description, metadata) and triggers an onClick callback when clicked.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: Modal dialog showing full details of a selected IP record, including description, metadata grid, and copyable document hash fields.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with a Header, Footer, and a TanStack Router Outlet for nested route rendering.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Empty file with no implementation; placeholder for a profile setup modal component.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: Success modal displayed after IP registration, showing the new IP record ID, ICP blockchain confirmation, and simulated future cross-chain references (Ethereum, Solana).
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: Stub component that renders nothing; kept to avoid broken imports after the token stats feature was removed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data, including user profiles, IP record queries (search, filter, list), and IP registration mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a dark-mode OKLCH color theme, and defines prose content utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Placeholder page component that renders nothing (returns null).
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with an animated world map, a feature grid highlighting the platform's IP registration capabilities, and navigation CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Searchable and filterable browse page for all on-chain IP records, supporting search by title/hash, category, and jurisdiction filters with a detail modal.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: Form page for registering new IP records, handling file upload with SHA-256 hashing, form validation, and displaying a success modal with the registered ID on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: Renders the IPGT whitepaper as a multi-section React page with a table of contents, print button, and structured content covering abstract, introduction, problem statement, and solution architecture.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a Black, Gold & White color theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), gold glow box shadows, accordion animations, and typography/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a globe/map visualization with a Black, Gold & White theme, recording known issues (blue continents, blurry background) and two active fix feature requests to address them.
